label: Active Militants in J&K (2026 est.)
contestNote: ~40-50 in Jammu region, ~40 in Kashmir Valley; lower than peak years
deltaNote: Apr 24: Pakistan escalated IWT suspension to UNSC — first UNSC letter on the treaty in its 65-year history. Apr 22–23 Pahalgam anniversary: Modi tribute, black marble memorial unveiled, Capitol Hill terror exhibition. ~993,596 tourists visited Pahalgam since attack. 46 militants killed since Pahalgam. Field Marshal Munir warns India of 'decisive response.'
